arts.ttl: Manchester City v Tottenham: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Live updates from 5.30pm UK time Email Scott | Live scoreboard – all Saturday’s details Manchester City: Ederson, Walker, Stones, Akanji, Gvardiol, Lewis, Gundogan, Bernardo, Savinho, Foden, Haaland. Subs: Ortega, Ake, Grealish, De Bruyne, Nunes, Wright, Simpson-Pusey, O’Reilly, McAtee. Tottenham Hotspur: Vicario, Porro, Dragusin, Davies, Udogie, Sarr, Bissouma, Maddison, Kulusevski, Son, Solanke. Subs: Forster, Spence, Hardy, Gray, Bergvall, Olusesi, Johnson, Werner, Lankshear. arts.ttl: 'I will be here' - Guardiola's relegation promise to Man City
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he will stand by Manchester City even if they are relegated over alleged breaches of financial rules.

arts.ttl: Akanji, Stones and Bernardo return for City vs Spurs LIVE!
arts.sum: Weirdly, we find Man City most unwell, as a four-game losing streak - the worst of Pep Guardiola's career - casts an early shadow over the champions' Premier League title defence. City will endeavour to close the five-point gap to leaders Liverpool in today's late kick off, live on Sky - they have not lost this many games consecutively in all competitions since 2006.

arts.ttl: Eric Dier’s Bayern Munich team-mate delivers surprising verdict on ex-Spurs star
arts.sum: Eric Dier became a favourite at Bayern Munich under Thomas Tuchel last season but has found regular game time much harder to come by under his successor Vincent Kompany - who is yet to hand him a start

arts.ttl: Postecoglou defends Spurs appeal over Bentancur ban
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head coach Ange Postecoglou says he is not interested in how the decision to appeal against Rodrigo Bentacur's seven-game domestic ban for a racist slur looks to the outside world.

arts.ttl: Man City vs Tottenham LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Pep Guardiola aims to end losing run
arts.sum: City were beaten by Tottenham in the Carabao Cup last month to start a four-game losing run in all competitions

arts.ttl: Confirmed: Real Madrid’s stance on signing Man City star Rodri
arts.sum: An insight into the stance of the powers that be at La Liga giants Real Madrid when it comes to the potental signing of Manchester City star Rodri has this…

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot fires title warning to Man City ahead of huge Premier League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool are five points clear at the top of the Premier League going into this weekend's matches, with Manchester City sitting nine five points adrift.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes Tottenham transfer claim and drops Richarlison and Wilson Odobert hint
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has indicated that Tottenham's January plans may depend on the status of his squad come the turn of the year. "Obviously Wilson will be out for a fair chunk of the season, Richy hopefully will be back in the new year but similar to Micky we just need to be careful every step of the way and Mikey will still be out for a little bit of time.

arts.ttl: What Pep Guardiola has told Man City squad about his future beyond two-year contract
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola hints at staying beyond 2027 as he tells Manchester City players his new two-year contract extension might be just the start
